mapper.select: SELECT e.EMP_ID empId, e.EMP_NAME empName, e.EMP_PW empPw, e.EMP_TEL empTel, e.EMP_EMAIL empEmail, e.EMP_DEPTNO empDeptno, d.DNAME empDname, e.EMP_AUTH empAuth, a.AUTH_NAME empAuthName, e.EMP_FIRST empFirst, e.EMP_INOFFICE empInOffice, e.EMP_HIREDATE empHiredate, e.EMP_IMG empImg FROM EMP e LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPT d ON e.EMP_DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO LEFT OUTER JOIN AUTH a ON e.EMP_AUTH = a.AUTH_NO WHERE upper(e.EMP_ID) = upper(#{empId}) and e.EMP_AUTH != 0 and e.EMP_INOFFICE in (0, 10)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE trim(UPPER(EMP_ID)) = trim(UPPER(#{empId})) AND TRIM(LOWER(EMP_EMAIL)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{empEmail})) AND EMP_AUTH != 0 AND EMP_INOFFICE in (0, 10)
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP SET EMP_PW = #{empPw}, EMP_FIRST = 'Y' WHERE trim(upper(EMP_ID)) = trim(upper(#{empId}))
UPDATE EMP SET EMP_PW = #{empPw}, EMP_FIRST = 'N' WHERE trim(upper(EMP_ID)) = trim(upper(#{empId}))
mapper.select: SELECT W.WORK_ID workId, I.ITEM_ID item, I.ITEM_NAME itemName, I.ITEM_UNIT itemUnit, W.WORK_ORDER_QTY qty, W.WORK_DIRECTOR directorId, D.EMP_NAME directorName, W.WORK_WORKER workerId, E.EMP_NAME workerName, W.WORK_STATUS status FROM WORK W LEFT OUTER JOIN PLAN P ON W.WORK_PLAN = P.PLAN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM I ON P.PLAN_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP D ON W.WORK_DIRECTOR = D.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP E ON W.WORK_WORKER = E.EMP_ID WHERE W.WORK_USAGE = 'Y' AND (W.WORK_WORKER = #{empId} or W.WORK_DIRECTOR = #{empId}) AND TRUNC(WORK_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24))

SELECT Q.QC_ID workId, I.ITEM_ID item, I.ITEM_NAME itemName, I.ITEM_UNIT itemUnit, Q.QC_ORDER_QTY qty, Q.QC_DIRECTOR directorId, D.EMP_NAME directorName, Q.QC_WORKER workerId, E.EMP_NAME workerName, Q.QC_STATUS status FROM QC W LEFT OUTER JOIN LOT L ON Q.QC_LOT = L.LOT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM I ON P.PLAN_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP D ON Q.QC_DIRECTOR = D.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP E ON Q.QC_WORKER = E.EMP_ID WHERE Q.QC_USAGE = 'Y' AND (Q.QC_WORKER = #{empId} or Q.QC_DIRECTOR = #{empId}) AND TRUNC(QC_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24))
SELECT * FROM SUGGESTION WHERE SUGG_USAGE = 'Y' AND SUGG_WRITER = #{empId} ORDER BY SUGG_CDATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP SET emp_name = #{empName}, emp_tel = #{empTel}, emp_email = #{empEmail} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.select: SELECT e.EMP_ID empId, e.EMP_NAME empName, e.EMP_PW empPw, e.EMP_TEL empTel, e.EMP_EMAIL empEmail, e.EMP_DEPTNO empDeptno, d.DNAME empDname, e.EMP_AUTH empAuth, a.AUTH_NAME empAuthName, e.EMP_FIRST empFirst, e.EMP_INOFFICE empInOffice, e.EMP_HIREDATE empHiredate, e.EMP_IMG empImg FROM EMP e LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPT d ON e.EMP_DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO LEFT OUTER JOIN AUTH a ON e.EMP_AUTH = a.AUTH_NO WHERE upper(e.EMP_ID) = upper(#{empId})
